exceptions.summary: Unit 4 is defined in the College Board CED and appears in local product/overview materials, but this repository currently has no local Passwater Unit 4 PDF.
exceptions.plannedHandling: Preserve Unit 4 CED metadata and app-facing labels, mark Unit 4 as locally unsourced for instructional implementation, and do not generate Passwater-derived class-period packages until a local source is provided.

exceptions.summary: Local product and overview language says approximately 54 lessons, while the listed AP topic sequence contains 58 topics.
exceptions.plannedHandling: Use 58 CED topics as the canonical planning count for curriculum-definition artifacts. Update product/runtime wording in a later app-facing cleanup if the team decides to present AP topics as lessons.

exceptions.summary: The official CED and clarification URLs are identified, but normalized source artifacts have not yet been generated under curriculum/source/.
exceptions.plannedHandling: Phase 2 should create deterministic normalized source artifacts before unit/topic source files or implementation packages are generated.
